title: Fancy Hearts
description: Replaces the default health bar with cleaner, fancier heart icons. (Fancy Hud included)
body:
**Fancy Hearts** is a texture pack that replaces the default hearts with cleaner, more detailed versions that look a lot fancier without ruining the original style. Along with the hearts, the pack also updates parts of the HUD and even tweaks the jumping bar you see when you're riding a horse or any other mount. It’s a small visual change overall, but it makes everything feel cleaner and more polished while still fitting right into the game.

![Hotbar Preview](https://i.imgur.com/M6St8MK.png)

>  _Zoro_
